hotels.name: Hotel Livemax Akihabara Kita
hotels.nearestStation: Naka-Okachimachi Station Exit 1, about 5 minutes on foot. JR Akihabara Station, about 8 minutes on foot.
hotels.taxiText: ホテルリブマックス秋葉原北（東京都台東区台東2-5-2）までお願いします。
hotels.returnNote: If data is weak, go to Naka-Okachimachi Station or Akihabara Station first, then walk to 2-5-2 Taito.

hotels.name: Hotel Horidome Villa
hotels.japaneseAddress: 〒103-0012 東京都中央区日本橋堀留町1-10-10
hotels.nearestStation: Kodenmacho Station / Ningyocho Station area, about 3-5 minutes on foot.
hotels.taxiText: ホテル堀留ヴィラ（東京都中央区日本橋堀留町1-10-10）までお願いします。
hotels.returnNote: If lost, go to Ningyocho, Kodemmacho, or Bakuro-yokoyama area and show the hotel name/address to station staff.

critical.airport: Return day: Hotel Horidome Villa -> Ningyocho Station -> Toei Asakusa Line through service / Keisei Narita Sky Access direction -> Narita Airport Terminal 2. Do not board a Haneda-bound train.
critical.flight: UO871, 2026-07-12 Sun, NRT Terminal 2 17:05 -> HKG Terminal 1 21:00. Target arrival at Narita T2: 13:45-14:00.
critical.emergency: First check passport, phone, wallet and travel documents. If data fails, show the hotel taxi text/address to station staff or taxi driver.
